title: Can't sort by item name column in mobile?
excerpt: Am I missing something, or is there no way to sort by the first column (item name) in the mobile app? If anyone knows how to do it, please let me know! I’ve searched and searched and can’t find it. You can sort by any ot…

posts.author: graceg (Grace Griffin @Purple Plum Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Am I missing something, or is there no way to sort by the first column (item name) in the mobile app? If anyone knows how to do it, please let me know! I’ve searched and searched and can’t find it. You can sort by any other column, which is great, why not by item name?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Grace,

I’ve checked in with the team on where this stands!

We plan on supporting this on iOS in Q2, and later this year on Android - stay tuned

posts.author: graceg (Grace Griffin @Purple Plum Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, Bianca.

posts.author: alexcamp (Alexandre Campagna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Bianca
Can you give us a timeframe for this ?
I have a two level sort in place which works great on PC but mobile iOS users (iPad) can’t see the correct sorting due to name column not sorting.
